name: AllenHark Relay (Slipstream)
description: Institutional-grade Solana transaction relay (marketed as Slipstream / AllenHark Relay). Bypasses the public mempool and routes directly to current and upcoming leaders for same-slot inclusion and MEV protection. Sender-agnostic with QUIC and HTTPS submission.

delivery.quic: First stream line 'api-key: YOUR_API_KEY\n' followed by the JSON payload

api_key.how_to_get: Contact AllenHark via Discord (https://discord.gg/JpzS72MAKG) or Telegram (https://t.me/antonyAllenHark).
api_key.note: Do not commit a real API key; load from environment variables. Keys can be rotated on request.

tip_wallet_note: Select one tip wallet randomly per transaction. The transfer must be a top-level instruction, not nested in a CPI (static analysis may miss it).
tip_note: During extreme congestion, 0.001 SOL may be insufficient; try 0.002-0.005 SOL.
cost_on_failure: not explicitly documented; tip is a SOL transfer instruction in the transaction, so it only executes if the transaction lands

quic.note: Recommended for production: persistent connections, multiplexing, 0-RTT resumption, ~0.1ms internal processing, up to 80% latency reduction vs HTTPS.

https.note: Fallback. ~1-5ms due to TCP/TLS overhead. Use for testing/scripts; prefer QUIC for live trading.

sendTransaction_https.description: Submit a signed transaction over HTTPS.

params_detail.simulate: MUST be false; setting it true returns simulate_forbidden

sendTransaction_quic.description: Submit a signed transaction over a QUIC bidirectional stream.
sendTransaction_quic.wire_format: Write 'api-key: YOUR_API_KEY\n' then the JSON payload {"tx": "<base64>", "simulate": false}, then finish the stream and read the response.

accepted.message: Transaction received and queued for broadcast

tip_missing.message: No transfer to an AllenHark tip wallet found

simulate_forbidden.message: simulate parameter was set to true

invalid_api_key.message: API key is missing or invalid

features.zero_slot_execution: Transactions can land in the same slot they are sent
features.zero_hop_delivery: Direct connections to current and upcoming leaders (broadcast to current + next 4 leaders)
features.mev_protection: Private transaction routing via leader TPU ports; never broadcast to public gossip until landed
features.no_simulation: Pure propagation engine; server-side validation only, simulate flag forbidden

best_practices: Use QUIC for live trading; HTTPS only for testing/scripts
Place the tip transfer at the top level of the transaction (not in a CPI)
Skip client-side preflight; validation happens server-side
Reuse QUIC connections with a 3s keep-alive ping
Fetch the latest blockhash from a fast RPC or AllenHark gRPC before sending
notes: AllenHark also offers staked RPC, Yellowstone gRPC, ShredStream, 0-slot landing, co-location, and managed validator products; this entry covers the Slipstream / AllenHark Relay transaction relay only.
The QUIC endpoint is documented as a bare IP (84.32.223.83) with SNI relay.allenhark.com.
